scroll

Bike Ad turns everyday streets into high-impact OOH media.

Triple-sided LED panels on motorbikes put your message at eye level — compared to all other forms of advertising.

Moving LED billboards · Cairo

YOUR BRAND ON THE MOVE

Bright LED screens mounted on delivery motorbikes, looping your ad through the busiest streets — traffic jams become your audience.

Put my ad on a bike How it works ↓
scroll
01

How it works

From your artwork to the streets in 48 hours.

  1. Send your ad

    Send us your design — or we create one for you. Static image or short animation, sized for the LED screen.

  2. We load the loop

    Your ad joins the rotation on our bike-mounted LED screens, switching every few seconds with a limited number of slots.

  3. Bikes hit the streets

    Delivery riders cover the city all day — main roads, bridges, squares — your ad glowing at eye level in traffic.

  4. You get the report

    Every summary is published on the Bike Ad app: routes covered, hours on the road, and estimated impressions for your campaign.

02

Reach that rides everywhere

0 bikes on the road
0 monthly impressions
0 on the street, every day
0 covered per bike, daily
03

Watch it in action

04

Where the bikes ride

Routes are optimized according to traffic data, ensuring bikes hit the busiest streets at the busiest hours.

  • Nasr City
  • Heliopolis
  • Downtown
  • Zamalek
  • Maadi
  • 6th of October
  • New Cairo
  • + your area on request
